summary_en: Daido Special Steel initiated a tender offer for all shares of Tohoku Steel at ¥4,491 per share to make it a wholly-owned subsidiary, with delisting planned.
title_en: Notice of Opinion in Support of and Recommendation for Participation in Tender Offer for Company Shares by Daido Special Steel Co., Ltd., a Related Company
translation_en_brief: On May 15, 2026, Tohoku Steel Co., Ltd. announced that its Board of Directors passed a resolution expressing support for and recommending shareholder participation in a tender offer by Daido Special Steel Co., Ltd., a related company in which Tohoku Steel is accounted for using the equity method. Daido Special Steel is offering ¥4,491 per share for all ordinary shares of Tohoku Steel, with the goal of making Tohoku Steel a wholly-owned subsidiary and subsequently delisting it from public markets. Daido currently owns 2,549,500 shares (34.32% ownership). The tender offer period runs from May 18 to June 29, 2026 (31 business days). The company's board decision was made with the approval of all independent directors and without objection from all independent auditors, ensuring fair process in this related-party transaction.
